Title: P8_ValidateOracleConnectivity
Step Action: Confirm with Oracle Team that Oracle integration setup ticket has been created
Verify the ticket description includes Oracle connection requirements and tenant-specific details
Step Expected Result: Ticket contains all necessary integration specifications

Step Action: Test database connectivity from the tenant environment to Oracle system
Confirm Oracle Team has validated connection parameters
Review Oracle integration logs for any connection-related errors
Step Expected Result: Logs show successful connection with no critical errors

Title: P8_ValidateOracleDataFeeds
Step Action: Confirm all required data feeds from Oracle are configured
Step Expected Result: Data feed configuration documented per requirements

Step Action: Request Oracle Team to execute test data feed transmission
Verify data arrives in tenant environment with correct structure and format
Confirm no data loss or corruption during transmission
Review data feed logs for any transmission errors
Step Expected Result: Logs show successful data delivery with no failures
